title: I Feel the Earth Move
why_this_song: I Feel the Earth Move by Carole King (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feel" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feel" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tumbling" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tumbling" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I feel the sky tumbling down

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "I Feel the Earth Move" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "I Feel the Earth Move" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "I Feel the Earth Move" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "I Feel the Earth Move"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Carole King one question about "I Feel the Earth Move", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Carole King sobre "I Feel the Earth Move", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
